risk_score_formula.description: Weighted risk score combining 6 signal components

components.name: delivery_gap_ratio
components.signal: Delivery shortfall — ratio of gap to estimated yield

components.name: fx_spread_pct
components.signal: FX arbitrage pressure — market vs official rate

components.name: border_risk
components.signal: Border proximity — sigmoid distance to nearest post

components.name: ore_grade_efficiency
components.signal: Operational anomaly — deviation from median efficiency

interpretation.low: Mine operates within normal parameters. No intervention required.
interpretation.moderate: Minor anomalies detected. Monitor for trend changes.
interpretation.elevated: Multiple risk signals present. Investigate delivery patterns.
interpretation.high: Strong risk signal. Priority investigation recommended.

academic_language.gap: structural divergence between estimated and reported output
